channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Govt hikes prices of soybean oil

- Soybean oil price up by Tk4 per litre
- Bottled soybean oil price raised by Tk 4 per litre

- Soybean oil price hiked by Tk 4 per litre
- Soybean oil price adjusted amid global market pressures

- Bottled soya bean oil price hiked by Tk 4 per litre
- Soybean oil price up by Tk4 per litre
